no_changes_rationale:
No changes: acceptance criteria already satisfied in base rev d4874cfd.

What is done (present in the pre-execute checkpoint d4874cfd from prior merged
attempts on this bead — commits 17b6ded9, 41fa9657, 9ee64108):

- AC1 (source change): cli/internal/server/graphql/resolver_feat008.go reads
  from the sharded sessions index via agent.ReadSessionIndex /
  agent.SessionIndexShardFiles (see r.efficacySnapshot at
  resolver_feat008.go:781). Legacy paths efficacyFingerprint,
  buildEfficacySnapshot event loop, attemptsFromEvidence, and efficacyMemo are
  removed — grep for those identifiers in resolver_feat008.go returns no
  matches.
- AC2 (schema parity): schema.graphql:2351-2370 adds nullable `since`,
  `until`, `projectId` args on `efficacyRows` and `efficacyAttempts`; row
  field shape unchanged.
- AC3/AC4 (fixture + baseline + perf targets): perf harness
  TestEfficacyRowsDateFilterAndPerfTargets in
  internal/server/graphql/efficacy_sessions_test.go:106 seeds a 10k-row
  2-shard fixture and a 50k-row 24-shard stretch fixture; measured p95s are
  recorded in the bead notes and meet every first-pass and stretch target.
- AC5 (DB-decision protocol): in-place session-index aggregation with
  shard-stat invalidated memoization met all targets — no substrate proposal
  required. Documented in bead notes.
- AC6 (completeness / superset):
  TestEfficacyRowsReadsSessionIndexAsStrictSupersetOfLegacyEvidence
  (efficacy_sessions_test.go:23) covers non-bead sessions.
- AC7 (freshness within 2s): TestEfficacyRowsFreshWithinTwoSeconds
  (efficacy_sessions_test.go:81).
- AC8 (Playwright smoke): cli/internal/server/frontend/e2e/efficacy.spec.ts:256
  renders the 10k-row aggregated fixture and exercises the attempts
  click-through, with the matching real-backend HTTP smoke
  TestEfficacyRowsSmokeOverRealBackend (efficacy_sessions_test.go:185)
  asserting the same fixture through the real GraphQL handler.
- AC9 (cross-reference): dependency on ddx-2ceb02fa and use of the landed
  session index are noted in the bead notes; no stub path was necessary.

Verification performed in this attempt:
- `go build ./...` — clean.
- `go test -run TestEfficacyRows ./internal/server/graphql/ -count=1` —
  passes (0.691s).

Why no commit: the checkpoint rev d4874cfd already contains the complete
implementation and every AC item maps to code, tests, and notes already in
the tree. A fresh commit would only duplicate work. The most recent
REVIEW:BLOCK notes in the bead reference a prior attempt's empty diff, not
the merged work present today; reviewer should re-verify against d4874cfd
rather than an earlier failed attempt's worktree.

Follow-up needed if reviewer still flags this:
- Identify the specific AC item believed to be unmet and point to the file
  path / symbol being checked. Every AC above has a concrete anchor in the
  current tree, so any block needs to cite which anchor is missing or wrong.
